bibliography:

methodology: The teaching metodology is based on an expository logic regarding the conceptual material being however, the most developed practical guidance as well as the attitudes encouraged research and incorporation of personal and group experience. Attendance and participation are fundamental to achieving the goals of the discipline (10%). In addition to practical work (30%) and the Written Test frequency 60%
objectives: Within the motivation reveal the interactions of individuals in increasingly diverse and demanding environments, enhance individual abilities for effective performance and the rewards adapt according to the needs. In the Leadership component, highlight the importance of the process of leadership in the successful management of people and organizations, identify the different types of leadership and its effectiveness depending on the situation, seize the soft skills to reveal the communicability in getting higher levels leadership.
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme: The importance of individual and group motivation; Organizations, individuals and groups. Motivation and motivated behavior; Theories of Motivation; Motivation and Productivity; The Essence of Leadership; The process of leadership; The evolution of theories of leadership; Leadership of teams and projects; The emergence of new concepts of leadership
presentation: The fundamental theoretical concepts to frame an effective and efficient manner in which to create conditions to motivate people and lead groups and individuals in organizations.
